name: TikTok Lite Video Hub
brief: Minimal Vietnamese Astro/Tailwind website listing long-form TikTok Lite links for fast opening.

stack.deployment_target: Cloudflare Pages or any static host

source_policy.video_links: External public TikTok Lite links only; no video files are hosted locally.
source_policy.duration_note: Durations are maintained as editorial metadata because TikTok Lite pages do not consistently expose machine-readable duration.
